    Profiles

      Video Library

      Connect to Moonraker to load videos and timelapses.

      /

      Connect to Moonraker to manage videos and timelapses.

      Timelapse Recorder

      Control the background recorder service that captures full-print videos and builds timelapses.

      State Unknown

      Connect to Moonraker to query service state.

      External recorder mode skips Moonraker service checks. Run the recorder script from your host terminal.

      Recorder output folders are configured in your timelapse recorder JSON config.

      Spoolman

      Spoolman server not available.

      --%

      Spoolman server not available.

      Press Refresh to load Spoolman data.

      Spool Selection

      Select a spool to set it active in Moonraker.

      Connection

      Dashboard

      Camera Settings

      Main Camera

      Toolhead Cam

      Interface

      Theme colors apply instantly and stay local to this browser.

      No local background image selected.

      Image is fixed to viewport and does not move while scrolling.

      Macros

      Fluidd-style category and macro controls. Macro gcode definitions are not edited.

      Categories

      No macro categories.

      Uncategorized Macros

      No macros loaded yet.

      These preferences are stored locally in Forge only.

      Warnings

      Warn if CPU throttling is detected

      CPU throttling can cause prints to fail.

      Warn if stepper driver is over-heating

      Trinamic drivers only.

      Console

      Console panel height in pixels.

      Console Filters

      Custom Filters

      No custom filters configured.

      Thermal Presets

      Create reusable hotend and bed target profiles.

      No thermal presets configured.

      Heightmap

      These settings affect the Heightmap page immediately and are stored locally in Forge.

      Timelapse

      Connect to Moonraker to load timelapse settings.

      Moonraker timelapse settings are not available on this host.

      General

      Enabled

      Enable or disable timelapse capture globally.

      Autorender

      Automatically render a video when a print ends.

      Camera

      Select the snapshot webcam used by timelapse.

      Snapshot URL is locked by backend settings.

      Mode

      Choose layermacro or hyperlapse capture mode.

      Hyperlapse Cycle

      Capture interval in seconds while in hyperlapse mode.

      Preview Image

      Save preview images for completed timelapses.

      Save Frames

      Keep source frames after rendering videos.

      Stream Delay Compensation

      Compensate snapshot capture delay in seconds.

      G-code Verbose

      Log verbose timelapse status in console output.

      Parkhead

      Parkhead

      Move toolhead to a parking position before snapshots.

      Park Position

      Preset or custom park target.

      Pos X

      Custom X parking coordinate in millimeters.

      Pos Y

      Custom Y parking coordinate in millimeters.

      Pos DZ

      Raise Z by this amount before parking.

      Travel Speed

      Park move speed in mm/s.

      Firmware Retract

      Use firmware retract commands during park sequence.

      Retract Speed

      Retraction speed in mm/s.

      Retract Distance

      Retraction distance in millimeters.

      Unretract Speed

      Prime speed in mm/s after parking.

      Unretract Distance

      Prime distance in millimeters after parking.

      Park Time

      Pause time before snapshot capture.

      Rendering Options

      Variable FPS

      Render with adaptive frame rate to target clip duration.

      Target Length

      Desired output length in seconds.

      Variable FPS Min

      Minimum frame count bound.

      Variable FPS Max

      Maximum frame count bound.

      Output Framerate

      Fixed output framerate.

      Duplicate Last Frame

      Number of times to duplicate the final frame.

      Constant Rate Factor

      FFmpeg quality CRF value.

      Pixel Format

      FFmpeg pixel format string.

      Time Format Code

      Timestamp format used for output naming.

      Extra Output Params

      Additional FFmpeg command parameters.

      Spoolman

      Fields to show in the Spoolman card

      Use Apply Selected Fields for card fields. Other Spoolman settings are saved with Save & Connect.

      Macro Settings

      Add Thermal Preset

      Hotend

      Bed

      Manual Probe

      Advanced

      Z Offset Saved

      Z-offset was applied. Save Config to make this value persistent after restart.

      Save Beacon Model

      Saving a new model can optionally remove the active one.

      AFC Settings

      Extruders

      Units

      Dashboard Layout

      Drag cards by the handle to change dashboard order and position.
